rationale: Decision: SPARQL UPDATE spec_registry_authoring discipline (D-S4-1 + ADR class). Embodiment = scripts/spec_registry_authoring.py (29.8KB Python module enacting the SPARQL UPDATE authoring discipline declared at the ADR). Structural judge must find ≥1 file:line citation in the embodiment file matching load-bearing tokens ('spec_registry_authoring', 'sparql', 'update', 'discipline'). The embodimentRef is NOT the DECISION_LOG itself — anti-substitution gate passes. Decision_token presence in DECISION_LOG is also satisfied (the registry section names this discipline).
